Please read

disclaimer

Disclaimer
APYs are annualized rate of rewards earned through staking ETH and auto-compounding. The staking rewards at any point in time is determined by the Ethereum network and can vary without prior notice. Stader cannot and does not guarantee a fixed percentage of rewards. Users are encouraged to do their own research and use their discretion before participating
